start: 👋 Hello! I am a TV series tracker bot. Use buttons below: • {btn_search} — find a series in TMDB • {btn_list} — your tracked list • {btn_help} — quick guide • {btn_language} — change language I will notify you about new episodes when TMDB updates data (check every {minutes} min).
help: 📖 How to use 1️⃣ Tap «{btn_search}» and type a series name. 2️⃣ Pick one result — you will see poster and details. 3️⃣ Tap «{btn_track}» → choose season. 4️⃣ Your list — «{btn_list}». /cancel — cancel search input.
prompt_search: Type a series title (at least 2 characters).\nCancel: button «❌ Cancel» or /cancel
search_empty: Nothing found. Try another title or tap Search again.
already_tracking: ⚠️ You are already tracking this season.
added_to_watchlist: ✅ {series_name} — Season {season_number} added to your watchlist! Already aired episodes: {aired} 🔔 I will notify you after TMDB updates data (check every ~{minutes} min).
add_failed: ⚠️ Could not add (maybe already in your list).
watchlist_empty: 📋 Your list is empty.\n\nTap «{btn_search}» and enter a series title.
watchlist_remove_hint: Tap a button below to remove:
idle_hint: Choose an action with buttons below or tap «{btn_search}».
inline_hint: Open bot and tap Search, or type at least 2 chars
